title: Anime Action Burst
summary: Bold anime hero unleashes an energy blast - cel-shaded sparks and speed lines.
prompt: A bold cel-shaded anime sequence: a young hero in a windswept coat raises both hands as a swirling sphere of golden energy gathers between their palms, then releases it in a flash of light. Speed lines, sparks, and dramatic dust kick out from the impact. Vibrant color blocking, crisp ink outlines, dynamic low-angle camera that pushes in on the moment of release. 5-second loop.
